personal_information.name: Abdulrahman Ali Muhmmed
personal_information.title: Senior Software Engineer
personal_information.summary: Android Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance mobile applications in fintech and e-commerce domains. Experienced in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), with a strong focus on clean architecture, modularization, and performance optimization. Proven ability to deliver production-ready features used by millions and solve complex engineering challenges across large-scale applications.
